frozen_statement_source: round-2/per_fact_score.json (canonical active item, canonical_score 0.5625). revalidation run-1/run-2는 동일 8-fact·동일 채점 구조의 추가 채점 인스턴스로 source에 포함하되, statement 텍스트는 canonical round-2 문구를 권위로 freeze함.

facts.statement: The single-choice object-backed path uses parent-owned id mapping plus comparator-backed id lookup, not direct object identity writes to the DOM.
Child add/update/remove events only mutate bookkeeping and request delayed reconciliation rather than performing a full immediate rewrite.
Reconciliation is coalesced with a queued flag and also gated against scheduling after the application injector is already destroyed.
The actual model-to-view rewrite runs in a one-shot post-render write phase rather than inside each child setter or destroy hook.
The scheduling uses the application injector because the node injector can already be destroyed during teardown, and the callback checks directive destruction before writing.
The hook is truly post-render and one-shot through shared after-render registration and cleanup semantics, not just an arbitrary delayed callback.
The multiple-choice control path is intentionally different because it updates immediately per child mutation instead of using the queued post-render pass.

The reasons for deferral include both cost and correctness: avoid repeated comparator scans, avoid premature browser state before child content is fully attached, and avoid wrong fallback selection during delayed removal.

band_derivation: F=8, weights uniform (각 1/8=0.125, weight_sum=1.0). per_fact_score.json은 객체 구조로 명시 weight 키가 없으나, overall_score == facts[].score 산술평균임을 검증함(round-2: 합 4.5/8=0.5625; revalidation run-1: 0.5625, run-2: 합 1.5/8=0.1875). 따라서 weight는 추출이 아니라 균일 1/8로 유도. Uniform이므로 밴드 = 1/F = 1/8 = 0.125. 재현 게이트는 이 schema로 round-2(0.5625), revalidation run-1(0.5625), revalidation run-2(0.1875) 세 앵커를 각각 ±0.125 안에서 재현해야 함.
